title: Bl0ckbuster
description: This essential mod pack is a Minecraft modification collection designed to enhance gameplay with crucial additions.
body:
# **This Project is no longer being maintained by ahaanshrivastava or me.**
This is because he has moved on from MC and I am only maintaining Praesodynium and MC+
The BL0ckbuster enhances Minecraft gameplay with Continuity, featuring connected textures for a visually immersive experience. It also includes Entity Culling for optimized rendering, AppleSkin for detailed hunger and saturation information, Better F3 for comprehensive debug data, and Zoomify for convenient zoom functionality. These essential tools are seamlessly integrated to optimize and enrich your adventures in Minecraft.I reccomend this to players who are hoping to get a vanilla moded experiance that does not alter any major things. This is why you should download this modpack.
**Disable Vsync to get Max Performance**
